title: Bangladesh: Thousands gather to pay final respects to Awami League veteran, despite ban
summary_full: Thousands gathered in Dhaka to honor Awami League veteran Tofail Ahmed, sparking speculation about the party's potential resurgence amidst a ban.  This event, coupled with claims of minimal reforms by the interim government and its alignment with certain parties, suggests a possible return for the Awami League. Meanwhile, a minority minister resigned citing health issues.
